title: Carnival: Buy, Sell, or Hold?
text: Carnival's recovering nicely from its early-pandemic cruise shutdowns. The company's seeing record demand for its cruises, and adjusted EBITDA in the most recent quarter beat estimates.

title: Better Buy: Walt Disney vs. Carnival

title: Here's why the Carnival share price just rocketed higher
text: Carnival (LON: CCL) share price was the best-performing in the FTSE 250 index as investors cheered the recovery in the cruise industry. The shares jumped to 740p in London, which was ~55% above the lowest level this year.
